span.p:
Filter: corr >= MIN_CORRELATION (0.8)
Filter: MIN_BETA (0.5) <= β <= MAX_BETA (2.0)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Calculate Spread:
Spread = log(COIN) - β × log(ETH)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Calculate 95th percentile
of |Z| over 440 bars (~4.5 days)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Apply EMA smoothing
α = 0.1 (10% new, 90% old)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Calculate Half-Life (O-U process)
HL = -ln(2) / λ
HALFLIFE_LOOKBACK=300

span.p:
Remove if failed:
CORRELATION_DROP or HURST_TRENDING
or FALSE_ALARM

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Fetch Funding Rates
COIN + ETH (normalize to 8h)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Calculate Net Funding Cost:
LONG: ETH_rate - COIN_rate
SHORT: COIN_rate - ETH_rate

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

Subscribe to Book Ticker
COIN + ETH prices

span.p:
Calculate Position Sizes
COIN: POSITION_SIZE_USDT (100)
PRIMARY: COIN × β

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Open COIN Position
LONG spread → BUY
SHORT spread → SELL

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Open PRIMARY Position
LONG spread → SELL
SHORT spread → BUY

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Calculate time_based_coefficient:
0-4h: coef=0.1 (wait for ~90%)
4-12h: coef=0.3 (~70%)
12-24h: coef=0.5 (~50%)
24h+: TIME_STOP
